name: pear-ci
description: Stateless stage for applications distributed with pear-runtime
author: Holepunch Inc

command.summary: Stage a local app to a Hyperdrive
command.flag --dry-run: Preview changes without committing them to the Hyperdrive
command.flag --name [name]: Specify target as a name (non global)
command.flag --snapshot [path]: Path to the snapshot file to use
command.flag --target [path]: Path to the directory to stage
